data.current_description: Directly call a named server function in an Anvil app using the server function API.
data.description_suggestion: Call a named server function in an Anvil app by function name. Accepts a FunctionCallRequest containing the function name and arguments. Requires authentication via Anvil uplink key or API key. Returns the function's result in a FunctionCallResponse object. Supports both synchronous execution and error handling for failed function calls.
